input_contract: tumor-normal WGS BAMs plus reference FASTA
primary_outputs: validated somatic SV VCF suitable for CHORD or HRDetect feature extraction
validation_target: HG008 and COLO829 SV truth reciprocal overlap
caveat: Manta is the first production SV candidate but must be containerized and validated before CHORD or HRDetect interpretation

input_contract: tumor-normal WGS BAMs plus reference FASTA
primary_outputs: breakend VCF with split-read and discordant-pair support for feature extraction
validation_target: HG008 and COLO829 SV truth reciprocal overlap
caveat: GRIDSS is a strong breakend caller but requires careful tumor-normal filtering and annotation policy

input_contract: tumor-normal WGS BAMs plus reference FASTA and exclusion regions
primary_outputs: SV BCF or VCF with DEL DUP INV TRA INS calls
validation_target: HG008 and COLO829 SV truth reciprocal overlap
caveat: DELLY is mature but needs explicit exclusion-region and somatic-filter policy before production use

input_contract: tumor-normal WGS BAMs plus reference FASTA
primary_outputs: indel and SV VCF for orthogonal caller comparison
validation_target: COLO829 and HG008 SV truth reciprocal overlap
caveat: SvABA is useful as an orthogonal cross-check but should not be the first production SV path until runtime is proven
